archimate:Grouping.name: Key Interoperability Enablers
archimate:Grouping.documentation:
Definition: A Key Interoperability Enabler is a Grouping that enables the efficient and effective delivery of public services across administrations
Source: ISA2 Article 2 (14)
Source reference: https://eur-lex.europa.eu/legal-content/EN/TXT/HTML/?uri=CELEX:32015D2240#d1e919-1-1
Interoperability Dimension: Structural IoP
Viewpoint: Key Interoperability Enablers viewpoint
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/KeyInteroperabilityEnablersGrouping
ABB name: eira:KeyInteroperabilityEnablersGrouping
EIRA concept: eira:ArchitectureBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2024-01-28
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/KeyInteroperabilityEnablersGrouping
Interoperability Layer: N/A

properties.value: A Key Interoperability Enabler is a Grouping that enables the efficient and effective delivery of public services across administrations
